column1: [Q] 다들 잘 지냈어? (da-deul jal ji-naess-eo?) / [A] 잘 지냈어 (jal ji-naess-eo)
column2: [Q] Has everyone been good? / [A] I have been good.

column1: [Q] 오늘도 왔어? (o-neul-do wass-eo?) / [A] 오늘도 왔어 (o-neul-do wass-eo)
column2: [Q] Are you here again today? / [A] I am here again today.

column1: [Q] 뭐가 궁금해? (mwo-ga gung-geum-hae?) / [A] 댓글로 알려줘 (daet-geul-lo al-ryeo-jwo)
column2: [Q] What are you curious about? / [A] Tell me in the comments.

column1: [Q] 좋아요 눌러줄래? (jo-a-yo nul-leo-jul-lae?) / [A] 좋아요 눌러줘 (jo-a-yo nul-leo-jwo)
column2: [Q] Can you press like? / [A] Hit like.

column1: [Q] 구독 눌러줄래? (gu-dok nul-leo-jul-lae?) / [A] 구독 눌러줘 (gu-dok nul-leo-jwo)
column2: [Q] Can you subscribe? / [A] Subscribe, please.

column1: [Q] 오늘 영상 어땠어? (o-neul yeong-sang eo-ttae-sseo?) / [A] 오늘도 봐줘서 고마워 (o-neul-do bwa-jwo-seo go-ma-wo)
column2: [Q] How was today's video? / [A] Thanks for watching today.

column1: [Q] 언니 너무 예뻐요 (eon-ni neo-mu ye-ppeo-yo) / [A] 에이, 아니에요 (e-i a-ni-e-yo)
column2: [Q] You are so pretty. / [A] Aww, no no.

column1: [Q] 한국어 진짜 잘해요 (han-gu-geo jin-jja jal-hae-yo) / [A] 아직 많이 부족해요 (a-jik ma-ni bu-jo-kae-yo)
column2: [Q] Your Korean is really good. / [A] I still have a lot to learn.

column1: [Q] 다음 영상 빨리 올려주세요 (da-eum yeong-sang ppal-li ol-lyeo-ju-se-yo) / [A] 기다려줘 (gi-da-ryeo-jwo)
column2: [Q] Please upload the next video soon. / [A] Wait for me.

column1: [Q] 어디로 갈까요? (eo-di-ro gal-kka-yo?) / [A] 홍대로 가주세요 (hong-dae-ro ga-ju-se-yo)
column2: [Q] Where should we go? / [A] Please go to Hongdae.

column1: [Q] 한국 왜 왔어요? (han-guk wae wass-eo-yo?) / [A] 아 네, 잘 모르겠어요 (ah ne jal mo-reu-gess-eo-yo)

column1: [Q] 영수증 드릴까요? (yeong-su-jeung deu-ril-kka-yo?) / [A] 괜찮아요 (gwaen-chan-a-yo)

column1: [Q] 혹시 OO 맞아요? (hok-si oo ma-ja-yo?) / [A] 헐! 대박! (heol dae-bak)

column1: [Q] 진짜 예뻐요 (jin-jja ye-ppeo-yo) / [A] 아니에요, 부끄러워요 (a-ni-e-yo bu-kkeu-reo-wo-yo)
